# registry_terraform_mirror (Resource)

Manages a Terraform/OpenTofu binary mirror configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "registry_terraform_mirror" "opentofu" {
  name                = "OpenTofu Releases"
  tool                = "opentofu"
  upstream_url        = "https://get.opentofu.org/tofu"
  platform_filter     = ["linux/amd64", "linux/arm64"]
  gpg_verify          = true
  stable_only         = true
  sync_interval_hours = 24
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the mirror configuration.
- `tool` (String) Tool to mirror: 'terraform', 'opentofu', or 'custom'.
- `upstream_url` (String) URL of the upstream release source.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Optional description.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether periodic syncing is enabled.
- `gpg_verify` (Boolean) Whether to verify GPG signatures on downloaded binaries.
- `platform_filter` (List of String) Platform allowlist in 'os/arch' format.
- `stable_only` (Boolean) Only mirror stable releases (no alpha/beta/rc).
- `sync_interval_hours` (Number) How often to sync in hours.
- `version_filter` (String) Version expression to filter which versions to mirror.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) ISO 8601 timestamp when the mirror was created.
- `id` (String) UUID of the Terraform mirror.
- `last_sync_at` (String) ISO 8601 timestamp of last sync.
- `last_sync_status` (String) Status of last sync.
- `updated_at` (String) ISO 8601 timestamp when the mirror was last updated.
